description_long: This object consists of three wooden barrels, each with a cylindrical shape and reinforced by several dark metal hoops. The barrels display a weathered, rustic appearance, with visible wood grain and some irregularities in the staves, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. One barrel is fully intact and closed, another is open at the top, and the third has a partially broken or slatted exterior, exposing the interior and giving it a skeletal look. The metal bands are riveted and show signs of rust, further emphasizing their utilitarian, aged character. The barrels are of similar size and construction, typical of those used for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial settings. No visible handles or markings are present, and the interiors appear empty.
description: A set of three weathered wooden barrels with dark metal hoops, one open, one closed, and one with a broken slatted exterior.
description_view_0: Three barrels side by side: left is open-topped, center is fully intact, right has a broken slatted exterior.
description_view_1: Barrels viewed from the end, highlighting the open tops and the skeletal structure of the rightmost barrel.
description_view_2: Three barrels reversed: left is the broken slatted barrel, center is intact, right is open-topped.
description_view_3: Barrels viewed from the opposite end, again showing the open tops and the slatted structure.
